meta.title: Marines could be getting drones armed with air-to-air missiles!?
meta.description:
The British drone firm Malloy Aeronautics just put America’s smallest air-to-air missiles on the US Marine Corps’ TRV-150 resupply drone and demonstrated its ability to strike targets both in the air and on the ground in what could be a huge development for unit-level airpower.
